productDisplayName: Forever New Women Magnolia Cream Dress
description: CompositionDrop waist magnolia dress made of 70% cotton and 30% silk, with a 100% cotton lining, tie up spaghetti straps, lace detailing on the neckline, below the waist and hemline, lace embellishment at the centre of the bust and a scalloped lace hemlineFittingRegularWash care Cold hand wash inside out separately Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Drip dry in shade Cool iron on reverse side Dry cleanable Fun, feminine and flirty are the highlights of this lacy drop waist dress from forever new. The magnolia colour brings out a little sophistication and the lace adds tons of girly fun. Wear it for your brunch date with pretty wedge heels and a bright red clutch for a brilliant splash of colour.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in dressesHeight-5.9", Chest-33"
